name: @agenttrust/mcp
description: AgentTrust MCP server — exposes the deployed AgentTrust programs as natural-language tools, resources, and prompts in Claude Desktop / Cursor / any MCP client

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.resolve('src/idl');const dst=path.resolve('dist/idl');fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src))if(f.endsWith('.json'))fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f));"
